kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Eastcheap goes with at least one of Mason, 13 coins, or 15 coins.
Eastcheap goes with Tanner if and only if at least one of Carpenter does not go with Aldric, someone in the North Side goes with Mason, or someone in the South Side goes with Wulfric.
Wulfric's levy is lower than both the Tanner and the artisan in Kingsford.
Exactly two of these are true: Cedric goes with Bridgegate; Cedric goes with 9 coins; Wulfric goes with Carpenter.
If Aldric goes with 7 coins, then Godfrey belongs to the Joiners' Guild.
Cedric goes with at least one of Blacksmith, Weaver, or Eastcheap.
Wulfric goes with exactly two of Mason, Riverside, and 17 coins.
Rowan's levy is between the artisan in Oldwall and the Mason.
Aldric, Cedric, and Blacksmith go with 7 coins, 9 coins, and 11 coins, in some order.
Either Aldric belongs to the Hill Ward or both members of the Joiners' Guild belong to the Hill Ward.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Foxglen goes with at least one of Perch, 16 lb, or 18 lb.
Foxglen goes with Pike if and only if at least one of Carp does not go with Boone, someone in the North Watershed goes with Perch, or someone in the Lowland Basin goes with Wade.
Wade's weight is lower than both the angler who landed the Pike and the angler at Grayreach.
Exactly two of these are true: Cody goes with Cedarmere; Cody goes with 12 lb; Wade goes with Carp.
If Boone goes with 10 lb, then Esther belongs to the Pike Family.
Cody goes with at least one of Bass, Trout, or Foxglen.
Wade goes with exactly two of Perch, Stillwater, and 20 lb.
Gus' weight is between the angler at Mossbank and the angler who landed the Perch.
Boone, Cody, and Bass go with 10 lb, 12 lb, and 14 lb, in some order.
Either Boone belongs to the West Watershed or both members of the Pike Family belong to the West Watershed.
